name: @qti-editor/interaction-shared
description: Shared QTI interaction schemas, elements, commands, and composer types

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && find src -type f -name '*.js' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.js.map' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.d.ts' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete
